zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Sergeaux II於大約1330年出生在英國可瓦爾博德明時，他的父親Sir Richard Sergeaux I37歲，母親Margaret le Seneschal27歲。他於大約1360年與Elizabeth de Bodrugan結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他於1389年被列為sheriff of cornwall。他去世於1393年9月30日在英國可瓦爾聖 馬比享年64歲，埋葬在英國可瓦爾聖 馬比。

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Sergeaux II was born about 1330, in Bodmin, Cornwall, England, his father, Sir Richard Sergeaux I, was 37 and his mother, Margaret le Seneschal, was 27. He married Elizabeth de Bodrugan about 1360. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. In 1389, at the age of 60, his occupation is listed as sheriff of cornwall. He died on 30 September 1393, in St Mabyn, Cornwall, England, at the age of 64, and was buried in St Mabyn, Cornwall, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Sergeaux II est né environ 1330, à Bodmin, Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Sergeaux I, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Margaret le Seneschal, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Bodrugan environ 1360. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. En 1389, à l’âge de 60 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of cornwall. Il est décédé le 30 septembre 1393, à St Mabyn, Cornouailles, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à St Mabyn, Cornouailles, Angleterre.

de.Colquite Manor, St.Mabyn, Cornwall, Engl: St Mabyn, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard Sergeaux II um 1330 in Bodmin, Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Sergeaux I 37 und seine Mutter Margaret le Seneschal 27. Er hat um 1360 Elizabeth de Bodrugan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. 1389, als er 60 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of cornwall aufgeführt. Er starb am 30. September 1393 im Alter von 64 Jahren in St Mabyn, Cornwall, England und wurde in St Mabyn, Cornwall, England begraben.

Lui sposato Elizabeth de Bodrugan circa 1360. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Nel 1389, all'età di 60 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of cornwall. ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Sergeaux IIが約1330年にイギリスコルンワルボドミンで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Sergeaux Iは37歳，母Margaret le Seneschalは27歳であった。約1360年にElizabeth de Bodruganと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。1389年，60歳の時，職業はsheriff of cornwallと記録されている。彼は1393年9月30日にイギリスコルンワルスト マブインで64歳で死去し，イギリスコルンワルスト マブインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Sergeaux II(이)가 대략 1330년 영국 코른월 보드민에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Sergeaux I(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret le Seneschal(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1360년 Elizabeth de Bodrugan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1389년, 60세의 나이로 그의 직업은 sheriff of cornwall이었다. 그는 1393년 9월 30일 영국 코른월 스트 마빈에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 코른월 스트 마빈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Sergeaux II nasceu aproximadamente 1330, em Bodmin, Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Sergeaux I, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Margaret le Seneschal, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Bodrugan aproximadamente 1360. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Em 1389, com 60 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of cornwall. Ele faleceu em 30 de setembro de 1393, em St Mabyn, Cornwall, Inglaterra, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em St Mabyn, Cornwall, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Sergeaux II родился около 1330 г. в местности бодминь, корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Sergeaux I было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret le Seneschal, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Bodrugan около 1360 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. В 1389 году, в возрасте 60 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff of cornwall. Он умер 30 сентября 1393 г. в местности ст мабин, корнвалл, Англия в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мабин, корнвалл, Англия.

Se casó con Elizabeth de Bodrugan aproximadamente 1360. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. En 1389, a la edad de 60 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of cornwall.
